benefits.description: Taking BPC-157 for gas, bloating, heartburn, reflux

side_effects.description: Numbness, warm tingling in fingers of both hands, mostly left hand; also occurring in left foot to lesser degree; symptoms come in waves and sometimes completely resolve
Fingers twitching in both hands but mostly in left hand

protocol_notes: User has prior history of neurological symptoms in left arm/hand; stopped BPC-157 to assess if symptoms subside; takes magnesium glycinate at night but recently stopped it to determine if it was the culprit; user's theory is possible histamine reaction
